findings.description: Pedro Zuñiga was the father of Adrian Zuñiga Rojas. Baptized 16 March 1870 in San Bartolomé, Arani, and living in the Arani–Pocoata area of Cochabamba, Bolivia; he married Apolonia Rojas in 1898. He is named as the groom's father in Adrian's 29 November 1913 marriage record.

target_person.name: Pedro Zuñiga
target_person.birth: baptized 16 March 1870, San Bartolomé, Arani, Cochabamba, Bolivia (also recorded as born about 1873, Pocoata)

supporting_sources: Bolivia, registros parroquiales — 29 November 1913 marriage of Adrian Zuñiga and Gregoria Peñarrieta at San Bartolomé, Arani, Cochabamba, naming the groom's father Pedro Zuñiga (FamilySearch, e.g. ark:/61903/1:1:QL7X-VBXX).
1898 marriage of Pedro Zuñiga and Apolonia Rojas, Pocoata, Cochabamba, Bolivia.

findings.description: Apolonia Rojas was the mother of Adrian Zuñiga Rojas. Born/baptized 16 March 1870 in Pocoata, Arani, Cochabamba, Bolivia; she married Pedro Zuñiga in 1898. Her surname survives in the subject's compound surname 'Zuñiga Rojas'.
supporting_sources: Bolivia, registros parroquiales — 1898 marriage of Pedro Zuñiga and Apolonia Rojas, Pocoata, Cochabamba, Bolivia.
Baptism of Apolonia Rojas, 16 March 1870, San Bartolomé, Arani, Cochabamba, Bolivia.
